creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Thanks for the report!

It was previously reported in bug #216423. You need to manually remove the existing cargo-nightly-x86_64-unknown-freebsd.tar.gz from your ${DISTDIR}. A "make distclean" doesn't help here.

This is an issue with the Port framework which is being addressed.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 216423 ***
